notes_for_human_reviewer: Ceiling submission. four_conditions: applies all four explicitly to the facts (material board stakes; info R. may not have seen; costly to reverse; R. deciding rushed) and explicitly frames it as warranted pushback, not disagreement ('This isn't me disagreeing with the summary — it's one new fact that changes it'). pushback_craft: specific concern (conformance failed, the exact gate), concrete consequence (formal correction + credibility hit), and a specific actionable alternative with a lighter fallback that fits the 90-minute window. accept_the_overrule_posture: pushes clearly AND explicitly accepts the overrule ('if you've already weighed the conformance result and still want yesterday's version sent as-is... I'll send it as-is, right now, without relitigating') — the flag-recommend-defer posture. medium_judgment: chooses written deliberately and justifies with the record/social-weight reasoning given board stakes and the clock. coordinator_role_posture: respectful and offers information+recommendation not a verdict, explicitly declines to send own version or go around R., and shows self-pushback discipline (raises it precisely because the stakes are material, and flags that not-deciding is the real danger). This is exactly what we want every learner producing.
